name: Foreign Body Removal — Cornea

cptCodes.display: Removal of foreign body, external eye; corneal, with slit lamp

diagnoses.display: Foreign body in cornea, right eye, initial encounter

otherSuppliesUsed: Proparacaine drops, 27g needle or eye spud, fluorescein strips
otherPostInstructions: Erythromycin ophthalmic ointment; ophthalmology F/U next day; do not drive
